message:
feat: add MoE inference test framework

Add framework to measure MoE FFN performance:
- Load model and tokenize input
- Initialize MoE layer weights from GGUF
- Measure framework overhead with dummy forward pass
- Report time per token and throughput

Next steps for full implementation:
1. Download Mixtral model for testing
2. Implement dequantization (Q8_0 -> FP32)
3. Call moe.moeFFN() with dequantized weights
4. Run through all 32 layers
5. Measure real tok/s performance

Technical details:
- moe_inference.zig: Add performance measurement loop
- optimizer.zig: Clean up Q2_K references
- Compiles successfully, ready for model download
